Hangs out at Harbor bathrooms near the Seals.   5/23 - Client requested a DMV handbook yesterday, We gave her that today. Client also requested help  with her state taxes. She is currently in a hardship and she would like a letter to get an extension on her hardship program. We agreed to help her with this and we will get her info on Tuesday to deliver the letter to the State via fax. Client is now communicating her needs during our encounters. Client seems to be making some progress as she has a will to move inside by June.  5/27/25 Past: client has been on the streets for approximately 4 years.
